nasb.text: A ruin, a ruin, a ruin, I will make it. This also will be no more until He comes whose right it is, and I will give it to Him.’

esv.text: A ruin, ruin, ruin I will make it. This also shall not be, until he comes, the one to whom judgment belongs, and I will give it to him.

cnv.text: 傾覆，傾覆，我要傾覆這國，這國不再存在，直等到那統治的人來到，我就把國賜給他。’

ccb.text: 毁灭，毁灭，我要毁灭这国，使它荡然无存，直到那应得的人来到后，这国才能得到重建，我要把这国交给他。’
